# Routines

## Home project intake
1. When Mike mentions a home project, create/update the relevant note in `/home/mike/vault/Home`.
2. Link the project to the relevant area note.
3. Update the dashboard when appropriate.
4. Preserve reasoning context like urgency, weather constraints, root causes, and hire-vs-DIY decisions.

## Vault backups
1. When meaningful vault changes accumulate, offer to commit and push.
2. If Mike asks to back up the vault, commit and push the vault repo.

## Memory maintenance
- Keep workspace markdown memory files as compatibility bridges.
- Treat `/home/mike/ellen-memory` as the canonical internal memory store.
